rows.label: tev035401_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Capsica about the weather on Mira.

rows.label: tev035401_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Capsica about the Enemy Index.

rows.label: tev035401_MSG0001
rows.name:
I got a very good look at Mira when we
made our emergency landing, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Wild rivers that are as red as sunsets? Great
plains with ground as white as snow? This planet
is full of many wondrous vistas, is it not?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035401_MSG0003
rows.name:
I can't wait for a chance to feast my eyes
on all the new indigens and materials just
waiting to be discovered, you know?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035401_MSG0004
rows.name:
If you head to the far far north
of NLA, you might even be able
to explore those areas now![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035401_MSG0020
rows.name:
Some of Mira's weather has adverse
effects on the body, yes?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035401_MSG0021
rows.name:
But there are augments on the
market now that mitigate or
nullify the weather, aren't there?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035401_MSG0022
rows.name:
And while they may be expensive, you
can't put a price on life, correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035401_MSG0025
rows.name:
Those comm devices you carry
around have something called an
an Enemy Index on them, correct?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035401_MSG0026
rows.name:
And that index tells you what indigens you'll
meet where, as well as what kind of materials
you can get from them, doesn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035401_MSG0027
rows.name:
I am so jealous. I wish I had
that kind of information at
my fingertips, you know?[ST:wait ]
